{{CargoRelic
|name=Leeku's Guitar
|class_id=20417
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=1-time rent award from [[Leeku]]. 
|description=Despite not being able to return to the music scene for a while, Leeku's love for music has always been undying, and she could play all kinds of musical instruments. This guitar is her favorite; it has been with it since her debut. Its strings have been replaced many times, but the tune remained ever-so-precise.
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail HP +60<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail HP +90<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail HP +90<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail HP +90<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
